MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-05-2021 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. ANDREA MURPHY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. MISS MURPHY REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, JOSEPH BRAVO, WITHDRAWS HIS OPPOSITION AND STIPULATES TO A TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/16/21 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 10/18/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY SHALL SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
